# System Design Notes — Engineering Vocabulary

> Generated from `vocabulary.json` — **Cassandra Banking Core API (Minimal)** v2.2.0
> Parsed at 2026-06-05T17:44:28.142014Z
> Totals: 265 entities · 1683 fields · 0 computed fields · 1221 events · 35 endpoints · 12 state machines · 0 plugins

This block is a verbatim dump of the current engineering vocabulary. Downstream regeneration decides what to reference in the Design Overlay v2 control blocks — do not pre-filter.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Summary | Control refs | Audit events |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/cases` | list_cases |  |  |
| `POST` | `/cases` | open_case |  |  |
| `GET` | `/cases/{id}` | get_case |  |  |
| `POST` | `/cases/{id}/transition` | transition_case |  |  |
| `GET` | `/control-results` | list_control_results |  |  |
| `GET` | `/control-results/{id}` | get_control_result |  |  |
| `GET` | `/documents` | list_documents |  |  |
| `POST` | `/documents` | create_document |  |  |
| `GET` | `/documents/{id}` | get_document |  |  |
| `GET` | `/events` | list_events |  |  |
| `GET` | `/filings` | list_filings |  |  |
| `POST` | `/filings` | prepare_filing |  |  |
| `GET` | `/filings/{id}` | get_filing |  |  |
| `POST` | `/filings/{id}/acknowledge` | acknowledge_filing |  |  |
| `POST` | `/filings/{id}/submit` | submit_filing |  |  |
| `GET` | `/incidents` | list |  |  |
| `POST` | `/incidents` | declare |  |  |
| `GET` | `/incidents/{id}` | get |  |  |
| `PATCH` | `/incidents/{id}` | update |  |  |
| `POST` | `/incidents/{id}/transition` | transition |  |  |
| `GET` | `/legal-holds` | list_legal_holds |  |  |
| `POST` | `/legal-holds` | place_legal_hold |  |  |
| `POST` | `/legal-holds/{id}/release` | release_legal_hold |  |  |
| `GET` | `/loan-applications` | list |  |  |
| `POST` | `/loan-applications` | create |  |  |
| `GET` | `/loan-applications/{id}` | get |  |  |
| `PATCH` | `/loan-applications/{id}` | update |  |  |
| `POST` | `/loan-applications/{id}/counteroffer` | issue_counteroffer |  |  |
| `POST` | `/loan-applications/{id}/decision` | record_decision |  |  |
| `GET` | `/loans` | list |  |  |
| `GET` | `/loans/{id}` | get |  |  |
| `POST` | `/loans/{id}/book` | request_booking |  |  |
| `GET` | `/tasks` | list_tasks |  |  |
| `GET` | `/tasks/{id}` | get_task |  |  |
| `POST` | `/tasks/{id}/complete` | complete_task |  |  |

## Tasks & timers

Registered task types (generic `Task` resource: `type` · `subject_ref` · `due_at` · `status`): `acknowledgement`, `analysis`, `approval`, `assessment`, `attestation`, `consolidation`, `decision`, `deprovision`, `disposal`, `escalation`, `exercise`, `expiry`, `filing`, `issuance`, `notice`, `onboarding`, `plan`, `purge`, `reconciliation`, `refresh`, `remediation`, `renewal`, `report`, `review`, `test`, `triage`, `update`, `verification`

Domain task/timer codes below are registered — each maps to a `Task` instance. Timer codes (`*_due_at`, `*_expires_at`) are the `due_at` of the named task; cite them in the *Within* column as registered timers.

| Code | Task type | Subject | Timer of |
|---|---|---|---|
| `access.deprovision_due_at` | `deprovision` | access | `access_deprovision` |
| `access.review_due` | `review` | access | `access_review` |
| `access.revocation_due_at` | `review` | access | `access_revocation` |
| `access_review.due` | `review` | access_review | `access_review_due` |
| `account.aan_due_at` | `issuance` | aan | `aan_issuance` |
| `account.closure_payout_due_at` | `review` | account_closure | `account_closure_payout` |
| `account.maturity_notice_due_at` | `notice` | account_maturity | `account_maturity_notice` |
| `account_freeze.application_due_at` | `review` | account_freeze | `account_freeze_application` |
| `advertising.reach_review_due` | `review` | advertising | `advertising_reach_review` |
| `ai.register_update_due_at` | `update` | ai_register | `ai_register_update` |
| `alm.irr_simulation_due` | `review` | alm_irr | `alm_irr_simulation` |
| `alm.irr_simulation_due_at` | `review` | alm_irr | `alm_irr_simulation` |
| `analytics.disparity_due_at` | `analysis` | disparity | `disparity_analysis` |
| `analytics.method_review_due` | `review` | analytics_method | `analytics_method_review` |
| `analytics.method_review_due_at` | `review` | analytics_method | `analytics_method_review` |
| `analytics.redlining_due_at` | `review` | redlining | `redlining_review` |
| `analytics.redlining_review_due` | `review` | redlining | `redlining_review` |
| `antivirus.log_review_due` | `review` | antivirus_log | `antivirus_log_review` |
| `application.counteroffer_due_at` | `expiry` | counteroffer | `counteroffer_expiry` |
| `application.notice_due_at` | `notice` | incompleteness | `incompleteness_notice` |
| `appraisal.delivery_due_at` | `review` | appraisal | `appraisal_delivery` |
| `asset.cmdb_update_due_at` | `update` | cmdb | `cmdb_update` |
| `audit.assessment_annual_due_at` | `review` | audit_assessment | `audit_assessment_annual` |
| `audit.compliance_audit_due` | `review` | compliance | `audit_compliance_audit` |
| `audit.compliance_audit_due_at` | `review` | compliance | `audit_compliance_audit` |
| `audit.cycle_timer` | `test` | independent | `independent_test` |
| `audit.engagement_due` | `test` | independent | `independent_test` |
| `audit.integrity_check_due` | `review` | audit_integrity | `audit_integrity_check` |
| `audit.monthly_schedule_due` | `review` | audit_monthly | `audit_monthly_schedule` |
| `audit.remediation_due` | `remediation` | finding | `finding_remediation` |
| `audit.remediation_timer` | `remediation` | finding | `finding_remediation` |
| `audit.retention_expires_at` | `review` | audit | `audit_retention` |
| `backup.restore_test_due` | `test` | backup_restore | `backup_restore_test` |
| `backup.verify_due` | `verification` | backup | `backup_verify` |
| `backup.verify_due_at` | `verification` | backup | `backup_verify` |
| `bcp.annual_review_due` | `review` | bcp_annual | `bcp_annual_review` |
| `bia.annual_update_due` | `update` | bia_annual | `bia_annual_update` |
| `bia.certification_due` | `review` | bia | `bia_certification` |
| `bia.review_due` | `review` | bia | `bia_review` |
| `board.notification_due_at` | `review` | board | `board_notification` |

| `wholesale_monthly_review` | `review` | wholesale_monthly |  |
| `wholesale_review` | `review` | wholesale |  |

## State machines

- **Account** (`status`): open, frozen, closed
- **AccountNumber** (``): active, disabled, canceled
- **AchTransfer** (`status`): pending_approval, submitted, settled, returned, rejected, canceled
- **Case** (`status`): opened, in_review, closed
- **Entity** (`status`): pending, active, disabled, archived
- **Filing** (`status`): prepared, submitted, acknowledged, continuing, amended, nil_determined
- **Incident** (`status`): declared, responding, contained, postmortem, closed
- **Loan** (``): booking_requested, booked, funded
- **LoanApplication** (``): created, decisioned, counteroffer, final_action
- **Task** (`status`): pending, due, completed, overdue
- **Verification** (`status`): pending, approved, denied
- **WireTransfer** (`status`): pending_approval, submitted, completed, return_requested, returned, rejected, canceled

## Plugins

_No plugins defined in vocabulary.json._
